components_analyzed.reason: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 7 reached End of Life on June 30, 2024. No further security patches or bug fixes are available without a paid ELS subscription.
Java 11 LTS is in extended support; Oracle's free public updates ended in September 2023. Java 17 and 21 are current LTS releases. Extended support continues through September 2026.
IBM WebSphere Application Server 7.0 reached End of Service on September 30, 2015. Running this version poses significant security and compliance risks.
Amazon RDS for MySQL is a managed service that receives automatic patching and version updates from AWS. AWS manages security and compatibility.
